Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.convert
JDBC-specific conversion classes.

    Method
    Description
    JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer
    JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer.registerConverter(Converter<?,?> converter)
    Add a custom Converter implementation.
    JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer

    Add a custom ConverterFactory implementation.
    JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer

    Add converters, factories, converter-aware objects, and generic converters.
    Method parameters in org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.convert with type arguments of type JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static JdbcCustomConversions
    JdbcCustomConversions.create(Dialect dialect, Consumer<JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer> configurer)
    Create a new JdbcCustomConversions instance using the given Dialect and JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer callback to configure converters.
